reason_for_decision: The article passes as a foundation explainer because it defines spectrum monitoring clearly, distinguishes it from one-time instrument use, and keeps interpretation boundaries honest.
strengths: The article explains well that monitoring is about patterns over time rather than isolated screenshots.
It draws a clean distinction between a spectrum analyzer as a tool and spectrum monitoring as a system or practice.
The limitations section usefully prevents readers from assuming monitoring alone reveals intent or authorization.
summary_assessment: This is a solid pass for a foundation article. It is readable, operationally honest, and gives non-specialists a useful mental model for RF awareness and monitoring systems.
